block_00: #1 trading method for a falling market
block_01: When the market is in a downturn, some novice traders may feel a little lost. What trading method might help them benefit from these turbulent conditions? How to find the best trading opportunities when the uncertainty is at its peak? One answer to these questions may be short selling.
block_02: Short selling offers an opportunity to trade on a falling market. It might come in useful when traders expect asset prices to go down. So they may choose to short sell: open a short position (Sell) instead of a more common long position (Buy).
block_03: With CFD (Contract for Difference) trading, short selling is available even without buying the underlying assets. To learn more about this method and how to apply it to your trading approach, check out this article.

block_10: Finding Entries With the DeMarker Indicator
block_11: This technical indicator is popular with day traders: it helps identify overbought and oversold assets, especially on short timeframes. Curious? Read on!
